composite_description: BEAR cycle with normal conditions -- nothing to do
brief:
Bitcoin remains in a structural bear cycle, trading below its 200-day moving average with a death cross signal intact. The market is in BEAR x BUSINESS_AS_USUAL regime—downtrend conditions but without extreme stress or panic signals. No action warranted at current positioning.

Fear and Greed at 23 reflects cautious sentiment, yet altcoin underperformance (ETH and SOL both negative vs BTC on a relative basis) and elevated Bitcoin dominance at 56.3% suggest orderly deleveraging rather than capitulation. Funding data unavailable, but the absence of extreme readings across major assets combined with moderate 5-day drawdowns indicates this is a grinding bear phase, not an inflection point.
